name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1546.012 - SilentProcessExit Monitoring Abuse for Persistence
description: Detects modification of the SilentProcessExit registry key to register a MonitorProcess that executes when a target process exits. Attackers abuse this IFEO sub-key to persist or execute payloads (e.g., hidden PowerShell) when benign processes like mspaint.exe terminate. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: registry.path: (*SilentProcessExit*MonitorProcess* OR *SilentProcessExit*ReportingMode* OR *SilentProcessExit*GlobalFlag*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1546.012 - IFEO Debugger Backdoor on Accessibility Tools
description: Detects setting the Debugger value under Image File Execution Options for accessibility binaries (sethc.exe, utilman.exe, osk.exe, narrator.exe, magnify.exe) to enable pre-authentication code execution. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12 with sethc.exe Debugger set to cmd.exe.
query: registry where event.action == "modification" and registry.path : ("*Image File Execution Options\\sethc.exe\\Debugger", "*Image File Execution Options\\utilman.exe\\Debugger", "*Image File Execution Options\\osk.exe\\Debugger", "*Image File Execution Options\\narrator.exe\\Debugger", "*Image File Execution Options\\magnify.exe\\Debugger", "*Image File Execution Options\\DisplaySwitch.exe\\Debugger", "*Image File Execution Options\\AtBroker.exe\\Debugger")
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1574.014 - AppDomainManager DLL Hijacking via Environment Variables
description: Detects .NET AppDomainManager injection via APPDOMAIN_MANAGER_ASM/TYPE environment variables or DomainManager.dll copy to system32. Any .NET app that loads will execute the attacker's assembly. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process.command_line: (*APPDOMAIN_MANAGER_ASM* OR *APPDOMAIN_MANAGER_TYPE*) OR (process.command_line: (*copy* AND *DomainManager* AND *system32*))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1546.015 - Recycle Bin CLSID Shell Command Persistence
description: Detects modification of the Recycle Bin COM CLSID ({645FF040-5081-101B-9F08-00AA002F954E}) shell\open\command registry key to execute arbitrary commands when a user opens the Recycle Bin. Observed via RecycleBinPersistence.exe in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: registry.path: (*645FF040-5081-101B-9F08-00AA002F954E*shell*open*command*)
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1106 - CoffLoader Beacon Object File Execution
description: Detects CoffLoader executing Beacon Object Files (.bof) for in-process post-exploitation. Observed loading adcs_enum.bof for AD Certificate Services reconnaissance in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("coffloader.exe", "coffloader64.exe", "COFFLoader.exe") or (process.command_line : "*.bof*" and process.command_line : "*go*"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1543.003 - Service Creation with Command Shell Binpath
description: Detects sc.exe creating services with cmd.exe, powershell.exe, or other interpreters as binpath - legitimate services never use shells as their binary. Observed creating 'evilsvc' with cmd.exe /c hostname as LocalSystem in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.name : "sc.exe" and process.command_line : "*create*" and process.command_line : ("*binpath*cmd*", "*binpath*powershell*", "*binpath*mshta*", "*binpath*wscript*", "*binpath*cscript*", "*binpath*rundll32*")
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1056.001 - Keylogger Tool Execution (WiretapKey/GetAsyncKeyState)
description: Detects execution of known keylogging tools including WiretapKey and GetAsyncKeyState-based keyloggers from staging paths. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12 launched from Temp and Users\Public.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("WiretapKey.exe", "getasynckeystate.exe", "KeyLogger.exe", "keylogger.exe") or (process.command_line : ("*capture_keystrokes*", "*GetAsyncKeyState*", "*keylog*") and process.executable : ("*\\Temp\\*", "*\\Public\\*", "*\\Downloads\\*")))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1036.005 - Masqueraded AdFind as sqlceip.exe
description: Detects AdFind.exe renamed to sqlceip.exe (SQL Server CEIP) to evade process name detections. The masqueraded binary runs typical AD queries with -f objectcategory=*. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12 staged in AppData\Local\Temp.
query: process where event.action == "start" and ((process.name : "sqlceip.exe" and process.command_line : ("*objectcategory*", "*-f *", "*-gcb*", "*-sc *")) or (process.pe.original_file_name : "AdFind.exe" and not process.name : "adfind.exe"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1564.001 - SharpHide Hidden Registry Run Key
description: Detects SharpHide.exe execution, which creates hidden Run registry keys using null-byte prefixed value names invisible to regedit. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12 creating a hidden key pointing to C:\Windows\Temp\Bla.exe.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("SharpHide.exe", "sharphide.exe") or process.command_line : ("*SharpHide*", "*sharphide*"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1053.005 - Scheduled Task with Masqueraded Name in Staging Path
description: Detects schtasks creating tasks referencing executables in user-writable staging paths with names masquerading as Chrome/Google binaries, or tasks using PowerShell bypass with frequent intervals typical of C2 beaconing. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.name : "schtasks.exe" and process.command_line : "*/create*" and (process.command_line : ("*AppData*Roaming*Chrome*", "*AppData*Roaming*Gchrome*", "*AppData*Roaming*Google*", "*Users*Public*Publ*") or (process.command_line : "*powershell*" and process.command_line : "*-ep bypass*" and process.command_line : "*Temp*"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1564.004 - Alternate Data Stream Payload Execution
description: Detects execution of payloads hidden in NTFS Alternate Data Streams and ADS creation via type redirection. Attackers hide executables in ADS and execute them as services. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12 with ServiceADS:cachetask.
query: process.command_line: (*type* AND *>* AND *:*) OR process.name: *ServiceADS*
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1574.002 - System Binary Copied to Temp for DLL Sideloading
description: Detects Windows system binaries (dism.exe, stordiag.exe, wsmprovhost.exe, OneDriveUpdater.exe, deviceeject.exe) being copied to user-writable staging paths for DLL sideloading. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12 with 12+ sideload chains.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.command_line : "*copy*" and process.command_line : ("*dism.exe*", "*stordiag.exe*", "*wsmprovhost.exe*", "*deviceeject.exe*", "*wmpnetwk.exe*", "*imagingdevices.exe*", "*OneDriveUpdater.exe*", "*msbuild.exe*") and process.command_line : ("*\\Temp*", "*\\Public*", "*\\Downloads*", "*\\ProgramData*", "*\\AppData*")
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1562.006 - ETW Event Tracing Patching for Defense Evasion
description: Detects tools that patch ETW functions in ntdll.dll to blind EDR sensors. Covers TamperETW, patch_etw_rust, Etwunhook, SnD_AMSI, and PowerShell COMPlus_ETWEnabled=0 disable. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("TamperETW.exe", "patch_etw_rust.exe", "Etwunhook.exe", "SnD_AMSI.exe") or process.command_line : ("*COMPlus_ETWEnabled=0*", "*EtwEventWrite*", "*NtTraceEvent*", "*EtwNotificationRegister*"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1123 - Audio Capture Tool Execution from Staging Path
description: Detects execution of audio/microphone capture tools from user-writable staging paths. Observed CustomMicRecorder.exe from Temp and audio.exe masquerading as Chrome in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("CustomMicRecorder.exe", "MicRecorder.exe", "AudioCapture.exe") or (process.name : "audio.exe" and process.executable : ("*\\Temp\\*", "*\\Public\\*", "*\\AppData\\*", "*\\ProgramData\\*")))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1021.003 - DCOM Lateral Movement via Offensive Tools
description: Detects DCOM-based lateral movement tools (CheeseDCOM, CsDCOM) abusing COM objects (MMC20.Application, ShellWindows, ShellBrowserWindow) for remote command execution. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("CheeseDCOM.exe", "CsDCOM.exe", "dcomexec.exe") or process.command_line : ("*MMC20Application*", "*ShellWindows*", "*ShellBrowserWindow*", "*ExcelDDE*"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1547.001 - BootExecute Registry Modification for Persistence
description: Detects modification of BootExecute registry value under Session Manager to append malicious executables that run before Windows logon. Observed appending calc.exe in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.name : "reg.exe" and process.command_line : "*BootExecute*" and process.command_line : "*Session Manager*"
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1003 - WDigest UseLogonCredential Enable for Credential Theft
description: Detects enabling WDigest authentication by setting UseLogonCredential=1 to force plaintext password storage in LSASS for Mimikatz dumping. Disabled by default since Win 8.1. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.command_line : "*WDigest*" and process.command_line : "*UseLogonCredential*" and process.command_line : "*/d 1*"
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1546.015 - COM InprocServer32 Hijacking to Staging Path
description: Detects COM object hijacking by modifying InprocServer32 registry keys under CLSID to point to DLLs in staging paths. Observed hijacking CLSID {01575CFE-...} in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.name : "reg.exe" and process.command_line : "*CLSID*" and process.command_line : "*InprocServer32*" and process.command_line : ("*\\Temp\\*", "*\\AppData\\*", "*\\Public\\*", "*\\ProgramData\\*", "*\\Downloads\\*")
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1543.003 - Malicious Service DLL Registration via Registry
description: Detects svchost-hosted service DLL persistence by setting ServiceDll parameter or registering new SvcHost service groups. Observed with MPSEvtMan, StorSyncSvc, SvcHostDemo fake services in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.name : "reg.exe" and ((process.command_line : "*Services*" and process.command_line : "*Parameters*" and process.command_line : "*ServiceDll*") or (process.command_line : "*SvcHost*" and process.command_line : "*REG_MULTI_SZ*"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1562.004 - Firewall Rule Blocking EDR/Defender Outbound
description: Detects creation of Windows Firewall rules blocking outbound connections for security products (MsMpEng, MsSense, SenseCncProxy) on port 443, blinding Defender/ATP cloud reporting. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and process.command_line : ("*New-NetFirewallRule*", "*netsh*") and process.command_line : ("*MsMpEng*", "*MsSense*", "*SenseCncProxy*", "*WinDefend*", "*Windows Defender*") and process.command_line : ("*Block*", "*block*")
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1106 - Windows API Callback-Based Shellcode Execution Tools
description: Detects execution of tools abusing Windows API callbacks (EnumWindows, CertEnumSystemStore, FlsAlloc, etc.) to execute shellcode without CreateThread. 45 unique tools observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("EnumWindows.exe", "EnumFontFamiliesExW.exe", "CertEnumSystemStoreLocation.exe", "CryptEnumOIDInfo.exe", "CreateThreadPoolWait.exe", "FlsAlloc.exe", "EnumSystemGeoID.exe", "EnumTimeFormatsEx.exe", "EnumUILanguagesW.exe", "ENUMSYSTEMCODEPAGESW.exe", "InitOnceExecuteOnce.exe", "ImmEnumInputContext.exe", "SymFindFileInPath.exe", "VerifierEnumerateResource.exe", "AppRecoveryCallback.exe", "FunctionCallback.exe", "ListPlanting.exe", "WindfarmDynamite.exe", "ExceptionOrientedProg.exe", "ShellcodeCopyWithMailslot.exe", "ShellcodeCopyWithPipe.exe") or process.name : "CBT_*")
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1490 - Ransomware Pre-Encryption Behavior Chain
description: Detects ransomware pre-encryption behaviors: wbadmin delete catalog/backup, bcdedit recoveryenabled/bootstatuspolicy tampering, Conti -shadowops flag, and VOLSNAP IOCTL tool. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and ((process.name : "wbadmin.exe" and process.command_line : ("*delete catalog*", "*delete backup*", "*delete systemstatebackup*")) or (process.name : "bcdedit.exe" and process.command_line : ("*recoveryenabled no*", "*bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures*")) or process.command_line : "*-shadowops*" or process.name : "IOCTL_VOLSNAP_SET_MAX_DIFF_AREA_SIZE.exe")
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12

name: [Picus Sim 2026-04-12] T1546 - Event Log Payload Storage Persistence (SharpEventPersist)
description: Detects SharpEventPersist and SharpEventLoader tools that store shellcode payloads inside Windows Event Log entries for fileless persistence. Observed in Picus simulation 2026-04-12.
query: process where event.action == "start" and (process.name : ("SharpEventPersist.exe", "SharpEventLoader.exe") or process.command_line : ("*SharpEventPersist*", "*SharpEventLoader*"))
author: Loaded Potato - Picus Simulation 2026-04-12
